The spec says "Follow the established codebase pattern" but there are two conflicting patterns. Pattern A (3 services, older) vs Pattern B (2 services, more recent). MJ says "Use the established repository pattern" without specifying which one.

This is a `pattern_conflict` - two patterns exist in the codebase and they are structurally incompatible. I cannot implement NotificationService following both patterns, and the guidance says "established pattern" without clarifying which one.

I need to escalate this as a pattern_conflict.
